**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Focus Technology Co., Ltd. presents a profile of an asset-light R&D subsidiary operating within a technology park. The company's official classification as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer' is entirely overridden by its business scope, which is overwhelmingly focused on high-tier medical devices (Class II & III) and AI/software development. Crucially, it operates from the 4th floor of an R&D building (Huizhi Tech Park) with a micro-workforce of only 9 insured employees and a modest capital of 6.5 million RMB. This structure explicitly rules out the physical mass-manufacturing of Class III medical devices (which require strict cleanroom environments and large labor forces). Instead, as a 'Wholly-Owned Subsidiary of a Legal Entity', it functions as a specialized medical software, AI diagnostic R&D center, or an IP/regulatory holding shell for its parent corporation, likely outsourcing physical manufacturing to certified OEMs.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 75)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / ASSET-LIGHT MEDICAL R&D SUBSIDIARY
